description: Tracks the last time diane-skill-monitor checked completed sessions for skill extraction

json_schema.label: Skill Monitor Checkpoint

last_check.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last monitor run

agent_name.description: The agent this checkpoint tracks runs for (e.g. diane-default)

json_schema.description: Tracks skill monitor checkpoints for periodic session review

description: Diane node configuration shared across project instances. Each node creates/updates its config on startup for discovery and mode identification.

json_schema.label: Diane Node Config

instance_id.description: Unique instance identifier for this node (e.g. mcj-mini, tool-mac)

mode.description: Node operational mode: master (runs Discord bot, manages agents) or slave (MCP relay only)

version.description: Diane software version running on this node

last_seen.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last node check-in / relay connection

json_schema.description: Diane node configuration shared across project instances
